entity.name: Open Healthcare Network Foundation
entity.description: Open Healthcare Network Foundation stewards open digital public infrastructure for healthcare. It supports the long-term development, release management, quality assurance, security, documentation, ecosystem enablement, and adoption of CARE and related open healthcare digital public goods.

projects.name: Care | Open Healthcare Network Foundation
projects.description: CARE is an open-source, standards-based healthcare platform used across hospital management, palliative care, critical care, and care coordination contexts. It is designed to support governments, hospitals, NGOs, and implementation partners with interoperable and self-hostable digital infrastructure.

channels.description: For grants, sponsorships, memberships, and institutional support, please contact the Open Healthcare Network Foundation.

plans.name: Visionary Sponsor
plans.description: Major philanthropic or institutional support for stewarding open healthcare digital public infrastructure. This supports platform development, releases, security, documentation, ecosystem enablement, and long-term sustainability of CARE and related DPGs.

plans.name: Foundation Member (Company)
plans.description: Annual membership for companies, implementation partners, healthcare providers, and ecosystem organizations that want to support and participate in the long-term stewardship of open healthcare infrastructure. Intended in the spirit of open foundation membership models.

plans.name: Individual Sponsor
plans.description: Support from individual donors and well-wishers who want to back open healthcare infrastructure and the long-term mission of the Open Healthcare Network Foundation.
